title: A Weekend at the Beach
content: Emma and her friends spent a weekend at a beach town several hours from the city. They arrived on Friday evening and immediately walked along the shore. The sound of the waves and the fresh sea air helped everyone relax. During the day, they swam, played volleyball, and enjoyed seafood at local restaurants. In the evenings, they watched beautiful sunsets over the ocean. The weather remained warm and sunny throughout the trip. When it was time to leave on Sunday, nobody wanted the weekend to end.
